commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps BOOT.md content as internal runtime context, adds a session-scoped boot echo guard, sanitizes message-tool visible send fields, suppresses emptied sends, adds focused tests, and edits CHANGELOG.md.

PR surface: Source +219, Tests +454, Docs +1. Total +674 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked report and PR proof give a concrete fallback-model message-tool leak shape, and source inspection shows current main still builds BOOT.md as ordinary boot prompt text; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
